# HermesCraft Hackathon Thread / Demo Plan

## Umbrella positioning

HermesCraft is one social AI system in Minecraft.
At one scale, it becomes a companion.
At another, it becomes a society.

## Post 1 — short hype post

Message:
- We built a social AI for Minecraft.
- One agent feels like a friend.
- Seven agents feel like a world.

Visual:
- short edited hype clip showing both scales quickly

## Post 2 — companion demo (~2 min)

Goal:
- make people want to play with it

Show:
- chat responsiveness
- helping with a concrete task
- memory / preference recall
- fair spatial understanding
- screenshot/vision verification for a build or layout choice

## Post 3 — civilization demo

Goal:
- make the emergent social layer legible

Show:
- personalities
- public vs private chat
- one catalyst event
- one alliance/conflict/coordination outcome
- role emergence or division of labor

## Narration principles
- always say “same system, different scale”
- avoid framing as two unrelated products
- make the fair-play perception story explicit
- emphasize that these are embodied Hermes agents, not just scripted NPCs

## Best overlays
- agent name
- current goal
- retrieved memory
- social event/channel (public, DM, overheard)
- scene summary / hazard cue when relevant
